description_long: This futuristic airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a predominantly black and teal color scheme accented by yellow and red highlights. The wings are short and sharply swept, mounted mid-fuselage, and equipped with cylindrical engine pods on each side. The nose is rounded and houses a prominent red-tinted intake or sensor, while the cockpit is smoothly integrated into the upper forward section with a glossy blue canopy. The rear of the airplane is squared off, with visible thruster nozzles and geometric paneling. The surface is mostly smooth and glossy, with some matte sections and detailed panel lines. The overall design suggests a high-speed, advanced aircraft suitable for urban environments or sci-fi settings.
description: A sleek, black and teal futuristic airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, side engine pods, and a glossy blue cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose with a red intake, angular wings, and side-mounted engine pods.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, mid-mounted wings, and cylindrical engines.
description_view_2: Top view reveals the geometric paneling, blue cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan configuration.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine pods, thruster nozzles, and angular rear section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with short, sharply swept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on each side of the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single glossy blue canopy.
